title: malaxis intermedia
intro: Malaxis intermedia, also known as the intermediate malaxis or grass pink orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that is native to North America. Traditionally, Malaxis intermedia has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
